caption: The video captures a panel discussion taking place on a stage with a modern and sleek design, featuring vibrant blue and purple lighting that creates an engaging atmosphere. Three individuals are seated in wooden chairs, engaged in conversation. The person on the left is a man wearing a white shirt and jeans, who appears to be speaking or reacting to something. In the middle is a woman dressed in black, attentively listening and smiling. On the right is another man in a gray suit, also participating in the discussion. A large screen behind them displays a live feed of the panel, enhancing the visual experience for the audience. The stage is adorned with a reflective surface, adding depth to the scene, and there is a decorative cube and a violin on stands, suggesting a blend of technology and artistry in the event's theme. The setting indicates a formal yet dynamic environment, likely part of a conference or talk show.
